name: Spain
full: Spain — Red Eléctrica, Iberdrola & CDTI Innovation
sub: Spain is Europe's largest renewable energy producer and grid operator, with Red Eléctrica investing €13.59B in transmission networks 2025-2030. Iberdrola PERSEO has invested €200M+ in AI portfolio. CDTI and IDAE provide €300M+ annually.
desc: Red Eléctrica (REE) operates Spain's high-voltage grid and is investing €13.59B across 2025-2030 specifically for renewable integration. Elewit Ventures is REE's corporate venture arm. Iberdrola PERSEO international startup program has invested €200M+ with explicit AI focus. CDTI (national R&D agency) and IDAE (energy agency) provide €300M+ annually in grants. Spanish company registration takes 2-4 weeks.

studies.label: Red Eléctrica Innovation Partnerships
studies.text:
What it doesRed Eléctrica operates 48,000+ km of Spanish grid with explicit AI/digitalisation roadmap. €13.59B allocated to transmission networks 2025-2030. Direct vendor partnerships for grid automation, forecasting, and congestion management. Elewit Ventures (REE corporate venture) actively invests in energy-tech startups.How to applyDirect approach to REE Innovation team or pitch to Elewit Ventures as VC deal.
Red EléctricaElewit Ventures
studies.deadline: Rolling — Elewit Ventures accepts startup pitches year-round. No fixed application windows. Elewit has made 8 investments to date.

eligibility.text: Grid Agents can approach directly — no nationality restriction. Red Eléctrica's €13.59B transmission investment and AI/digitalisation roadmap align with Grid Agents' connection queue management. Elewit Ventures provides a CVC route.

relevance.text: Elewit 5th Venture Client Programme (2025) selected DeNexus, AssetCool, Navgar, Ocean Ecostructures across cybersecurity, new materials, AI project management, and marine themes. €13.59B transmission investment 2025-2030. Elewit has made 8 investments to date. Rolling startup pitches accepted.

applicationRoute.step: Direct approach to REE Innovation team
applicationRoute.detail: Or pitch to Elewit Ventures as VC deal
Focus on congestion management and queue optimisation
Commercial terms or equity deal via corporate venture

studies.label: Iberdrola PERSEO
studies.text:
What it doesInternational startup programme with €200M+ invested in AI, renewable integration, and grid management portfolio. Equity and strategic partnership model. Explicit focus on next-generation grid technologies.Why it mattersDirect access to Europe's largest utility (81M customers). Iberdola operates in Spain, Portugal, UK, US, Mexico, and Brazil.
Iberdrola PERSEO
studies.deadline: Rolling — multiple active challenges open on iberdrola.com including grid resilience, wind measurement, and solar plant inspection. No fixed annual deadline.

eligibility.text: Grid Agents can apply internationally — no nationality restriction. PERSEO's €200M+ portfolio and explicit focus on next-generation grid technologies directly aligns with Grid Agents' AI platform. Multi-market access (Spain, UK, US, Brazil).

relevance.text: €200M+ invested, 6 challenges/year, ~25 pilots/PoCs. Current open challenges include Electricity Network Resilience (advanced computing for distribution resilience during extreme weather). Strategic area 'Grid of the future' seeks smart, digital, flexible grid tech. Winners sign pilot agreements with costs covered and real-site access.

applicationRoute.step: Present pitch deck with product demo
applicationRoute.detail: Equity deal — standard VC metrics expected
Evaluated by Iberdrola grid technology experts

studies.label: CDTI R&D Funding (NEOTEC 2025+)
studies.text:
What it doesSpain's Centre for Industrial Technological Development. NEOTEC programme funds R&D projects in AI, climate, and energy. Grants cover 40-75% of eligible costs. €300M+ pool across all sectors. Rolling applications via online portal.RequirementsSpanish company registration required (2-4 weeks to establish SL/SLU).
CDTI PortalNEOTEC 2025
studies.budget: Up to €250K per beneficiary (€20M total 2026 budget)
studies.deadline: 2026 convocatoria expected to open March-April 2026. Application window typically 6-8 weeks. Companies must have been founded between May 2022 and November 2024.

eligibility.text: Grid Agents would need a Spanish company (SL/SLU, 2-4 weeks, €3-5K). AI and energy innovation fits NEOTEC criteria. Note: companies must have been founded between May 2022 and November 2024 — check Grid Agents' founding date eligibility.

relevance.text: NEOTEC 2026 expected to open April-May 2026. Grants up to €325K (85% subsidy). NEOTEC 2025 was most competitive ever — only applications scoring 79+/100 funded. Eligibility: small enterprises, 6 months to 3 years old, proprietary technology. Check Grid Agents' founding date eligibility.

applicationRoute.detail: 40-75% of eligible costs covered if approved

studies.label: IDAE Energy Innovation Grants
studies.text:
What it doesSpanish Institute for Energy Diversification & Saving. Dedicated innovation budget (€200M+) for grid modernisation, distributed energy, and AI integration. 50-75% cost coverage for approved projects.
IDAE Portal
studies.deadline: Periodic calls — check sede.idae.gob.es for current open calls. Dedicated energy innovation windows typically 1-2 per year.

eligibility.text: Grid Agents would need a Spanish entity. AI grid automation fits IDAE's grid modernisation and AI integration focus. Worth pursuing if establishing Spanish entity for Red Eléctrica or Iberdrola partnerships.

relevance.text: Over €1.3B in active calls including Innovative Renewable Energy & Storage (€202.5M), RENOVAL II (€355M), PORT-EOLMAR (€212M). Highly oversubscribed (€6B requests vs €700M allocated). Demand-side management equipment call expected 2026. Grid AI eligible under innovation category.

applicationRoute.step: Establish Spanish entity if not already

studies.label: ENISA (SME Growth Support)
studies.text:
What it doesSpanish state-owned entity providing quasi-equity loans (€300K-€1.5M) and growth financing for SMEs. No interest during growth phase. Explicit support for DeepTech and ClimaTech.
ENISA Portal
studies.deadline: Rolling — submit via portaldelcliente.enisa.es. Continuous application acceptance.

eligibility.text: Grid Agents would need a Spanish entity. Quasi-equity loans (€300K-€1.5M) with no interest during growth phase. Could support Spanish market expansion if entity is established for Iberdrola or Red Eléctrica work.

relevance.text: €303M total budget (€200M 2025, €103M 2026). New 'Startups and SMEs' funding line since August 2025. For transactions under €300K, ENISA may grant first tranche with pre-approved second tranche on milestones. €40M EIF guarantee agreement supporting Spanish startups.

applicationRoute.detail: Evaluated on growth potential and technology
No interest during growth phase; repayment later

studies.label: Endesa Innovation (Enel Group)
studies.text:
What it doesEnel Group's Spanish utility Endesa runs open innovation with vendor partnerships. €150M+ portfolio. Joint ventures with startups in grid automation and forecasting.
Enel Open Innovability
studies.deadline: Rolling — open innovation partnerships negotiated on individual basis.

eligibility.text: Grid Agents can approach directly — no nationality restriction. Endesa's grid automation and forecasting focus aligns with Grid Agents' AI platform for connection processing at distribution level.

relevance.text: 2026-2028 Strategic Plan: 50%+ of €10.6B capex targeting grid infrastructure. €5.5B allocated to Spain. Innovation Hubs in Madrid (TheCube: IoT, Data Science, AI) and Barcelona. e-distribución deploys LV Supervisor devices, IoT digital twins, and fraud detection. Open Innovability platform for startup challenges.

applicationRoute.detail: Joint venture or vendor partnership model

studies.label: i-DE Redes Eléctricas (Iberdrola Distribution)
studies.text:
What it doesi-DE (Iberdrola Group) is Spain's largest DSO with 11M+ customers across 10 autonomous communities. Runs the S2F Sandbox (regulatory innovation for flexibility in distribution networks) involving most Spanish distribution companies. Partner in BeFlexible (EU-funded, 12 pilots across Italy/Sweden/Spain/France promoting prosumer flexibility). CoordiNet follow-on tested local flexibility markets in Spanish demo.Why it mattersSpain's largest DSO with active innovation in distribution flexibility and AI for grid management.
i-DE InnovationBeFlexible Project
studies.deadline: Rolling — innovation partnerships and S2F Sandbox projects ongoing.
studies.budgetBasis: i-DE does not publish per-partnership budgets. Estimated from S2F Sandbox scope and comparable European DSO innovation programmes.

eligibility.text: Grid Agents can approach directly via Iberdrola/PERSEO route. i-DE's S2F Sandbox and BeFlexible projects create multiple engagement points for AI grid technology.

relevance.text: S2F Sandbox involves most Spanish distribution companies in regulatory innovation for distribution flexibility. BeFlexible runs 12 pilots promoting prosumer flexibility coordinated with Red Eléctrica (TSO) and OMIE (market operator). Distribution-level grid management directly relevant.

applicationRoute.step: Contact i-DE via Iberdrola innovation channels

applicationRoute.detail: Focus on flexibility management or connection processing
Participate in ongoing regulatory innovation projects

dsoPartners.name: e-distribución
dsoPartners.engagement: Enel Open Innovability platform (€280M in supply contracts to startups). TheCube Innovation Hub (Madrid). LV Supervisor, IoT digital twins, fraud detection AI.

dsoPartners.name: UFD Distribución
dsoPartners.region: Asturias, Cantabria, parts of Galicia, Aragon
dsoPartners.engagement: EDP Energy Starter programme (183 startups, €23M invested, 7 editions). Fully-funded pilots. UK startups selected in past cohorts.

faq.q: What is Red Eléctrica's €13.59B investment targeting?
faq.a: Transmission network modernisation 2025-2030, with explicit focus on renewable integration, AI automation, and congestion management. This is the single largest grid infrastructure investment in Southern Europe.

faq.q: How much has Iberdrola PERSEO invested to date?
faq.a: €200M+ in portfolio across AI, renewable integration, and grid tech startups. PERSEO explicitly positions grid interconnection queue management as a priority.

faq.q: How quickly can I register a Spanish company?
faq.a: 2-4 weeks for SL (Ltd) or SLU (limited liability sole trader). Costs €3-5K for legal registration. This unlocks access to CDTI (€300M), IDAE (€200M), and ENISA funding.

faq.q: What's the difference between CDTI and IDAE grants?
faq.a: CDTI focuses on R&D and technology development (40-75% subsidy). IDAE focuses on energy innovation and deployment (50-75% subsidy). Both are worth applying to in parallel.

faq.q: Can we pitch to multiple Spanish utilities?
faq.a: Yes. Red Eléctrica, Endesa, Iberdrola, and regional utilities all have independent innovation partnerships. They typically don't have exclusivity clauses for technology partnerships.

note: Spain is Europe's renewable energy leader with €13.59B transmission investment 2025-2030. Elewit Ventures (REE) and Iberdrola PERSEO offer immediate VC access. Spanish registration (2-4 weeks) unlocks €500M+ in government grants (CDTI, IDAE, ENISA).
